headline: Textron Industrial Split Refocuses TXT On Aerospace And Defense Valuation
summary: Textron (NYSE:TXT) has announced a plan to separate its Industrial segment through a sale or spin off. The move is intended to refocus the company as a pure play aerospace and defense business. The separation would leave Textron centered on aviation, defense, and related services while divesting non core industrial operations. For you as an investor, this marks a clear shift in how Textron positions itself in the market. The company has long combined aviation, defense, and industrial...
